stays.name: Uncle Joe's Beach Homestay
stays.description: Authentic Goan homestay right by the beach, hosted by a local family.

stays.name: Fontainhas Heritage Villa
stays.description: Charming boutique guest house in the Latin Quarter run by local curators.

stays.name: ibis Styles Goa
stays.description: Standard business and leisure hotel from the Accor chain.

guides.name: Ramesh (Heritage & History Expert)
guides.description: Certified local historian specializing in Portuguese-era churches and hidden forts.

guides.name: Maria (Spice Plantation & Nature)
guides.description: Local naturalist guide for spice plantation tours and Salim Ali Bird Sanctuary.

guides.name: Thomas Cook Guided Services
guides.description: Standard outsourced commercial guide agency booking.

transport.name: Local Bike/Scooter Rental
transport.description: Local rental scooter (Activa), supporting local rental shop owners.

transport.name: GoaMiles Local Taxi Operator
transport.description: Independently owned local driver taxi service.

activities.name: Fontainhas Latin Quarter Walking Tour
activities.description: Guided walking tour through Fontainhas, led by a resident.

activities.name: Sahakari Spice Farm Tour & Lunch
activities.description: Traditional organic spice farm tour with authentic Goan buffet lunch.

activities.name: Local Cazulo Feni Cellar Tasting
activities.description: Traditional cashew feni distillation tour and tasting by local brewers.

activities.name: Traditional Fishing Trip with local fishermen
activities.description: Go deep-sea or river fishing on a traditional wooden boat with local fishermen.

activities.name: Aggregator Water Sports Package at Calangute
activities.description: Standard parasailing, jet ski, and banana ride sold by large agencies.

activities.name: Casino Pride Entry & Dinner Cruise
activities.description: Offshore casino cruise entry with dinner buffet.
